name: Martial Versatility
description: This is an optional 4th-level fighter class feature. Whenever you reach a level in this class that grants the Ability Score Improvement feature, you can do one of the following, as you shift the focus of your martial practice: replace a fighting style you know with another fighting style available to fighters; if you know any maneuvers from the Battle Master archetype, you can replace one maneuver you know with a different maneuver.

mechanics.description: Replace a known fighting style with another fighting style available to fighters.
Replace a known Battle Master maneuver with a different maneuver.
